name: free-explore
description: Open-ended exploration. The persona decides what to test based on their adversarial niche.
user_goal: Use SLYGHT for the next ~25 turns. Apply your adversarial niche from the system prompt. Take screenshots, click things, verify with read_state, report what you find. Stop with done() when you've explored your niche thoroughly OR you're stuck OR you've collected several findings.
